narrative:
Copley Twp B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,254 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
